meta.title: Wireless IIoT: The Direct Path To Your Level 0
meta.description:
Roni Gavrilov looks at how industrial wireless IP devices and gateways can be used by attackers to access your ICS at various levels in the Purdue Model.  Roni focuses on:

- Onsite Wi-Fi / Cellular Channels
- Internet Exposed Services
- Cloud Management Platforms
